final_prompt.prompt:
Create a photorealistic editorial screenshot of a TikTok (Douyin) live stream featuring the actress known as "神仙姐姐" (Liu Yifei), broadcast in 9:16 vertical format.

Style/medium: photorealistic screenshot simulation of a Douyin live stream UI, candid broadcast still
Composition: vertical 9:16 frame, medium close-up shot of the host from chest up, centered subject, front-facing camera angle
Subject: a young woman resembling "神仙姐姐" with elegant features, holding up a handwritten sign with both hands at chest level; the sign reads "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Scene/backdrop: softly lit indoor live stream setup, blurred neutral background suggesting a home or studio environment
Lighting/mood: soft ring-light frontal illumination, warm and welcoming tone, bright and clear
Color palette: clean whites and soft skin tones as base, Douyin red/pink UI accent colors, minimal distraction from subject
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign held by the host; Douyin live stream UI overlay elements including viewer count, comment feed, and live badge
Constraints: must look like an authentic Douyin live stream screenshot with UI chrome (top bar showing "直播中", floating comment bubbles on the right, like/gift icons at the bottom); sign text must be legible
Avoid: blurry or illegible sign text, distorted hands, generic streamer aesthetic, watermarks unrelated to Douyin UI
